name: Hover Telemark
preceding_figure_names: Basic Weave, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Feather Step, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Weave, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Reverse Turn, Top Spin, Weave from PP
following_figure_names: Feather Step, Basic Weave, Hover Feather, Natural Turn, Natural Weave, Natural Telemark, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Natural Hover Telemark, Curved Feather to Back Feather
notes:
Hover Telemark can finish in Promenade Position. See Hover Telemark to PP.
Note unusual type of rise.
When landing on LF, small range of motion to recover from sway.
When traveling backwards, never turn shoulders so you don't cross center line. When going back, upper body is not a rotary motion, body should be stretching diagonal.
Left side is very lengthened, stretched. Head shaped to right. Keep elbows in front of body. Pick up stomach back to spine.
Then dissolve the sway.

steps.action: LF to side and slightly forward
comments: When landing on LF, small range of motion to recover from sway.
When traveling backwards, never turn shoulders so you don't cross center line. When going back, upper body is not a rotary motion, body should be stretching diagonal.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back
